hero.question: Counter-Strike: PARIVISION vs Legacy (BO3) - PGL Bucharest Group Stage
hero.prob_take: At 18.5%, the market is pricing PARIVISION as a heavy underdog despite recent form shifts that suggest Legacy isn't the juggernaut this line assumes. The sharp move down 45 points in 24 hours signals informed money detected value at 20%+, so if you're buying here you're basically betting the crowd overweighted Legacy's reputation over their actual recent LAN performance.

daily_take.headline: PARIVISION Collapsed 45 Points. The Market Might Be Panicking.
daily_take.deck: PARIVISION just tanked from 63.5% to 18.5% in 24 hours on a $363K volume spike. This looks like sharp money rushed in on new intel, but the move feels violent enough to question if the market overshot. Legacy is solid but not 81.5% chalk in a BO3. Smart bettors should check what triggered the dump before assuming the odds are right.
